primary_race.rationale: Based on W20 (2026-05-17) snapshot: 20K training PB 1:48:25 @5:25/km (not all-out), Tempo 6km @4:33/km avg HR 153 (well below LTHR 163, controlled). Bottleneck is endurance at HM distance, not speed. Sub-1:45 target requires CTL build from 27 → 45-50 with progressive HM-pace work in Build/Specific phases.

current_personal_bests.note: Training run times, not race times. 21.1K (HM) never raced — first race performance is part of the goal.

secondary_goals.rationale: Power-to-weight for running endurance + reduces shin/calf joint load
secondary_goals.tracking: summary.weight in weekly files + metrics_history.weight field

secondary_goals.goal: Decoupling <3% on every long run (currently <5% gate)
secondary_goals.rationale: Mark of well-developed aerobic base. Tighter than entry gate.

secondary_goals.goal: CTL stable above 45 through Build phase
secondary_goals.rationale: Floor for HM-specific work without losing fitness in recovery weeks
